_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 47: EU Declaration of Conformity
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
basis: EU AI Act Annex V -- EU Declaration of Conformity content requirements

requirements.title: EU Declaration of Conformity Document
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST draw up a written, machine-readable EU Declaration of Conformity for each high-risk AI system.
required_content: Statement that the DoC is issued under the sole responsibility of the provider
Reference to conformity assessment procedure used
Reference to harmonised standards or common specifications applied
acceptable_formats: Machine-readable digital document (JSON, XML, PDF/A with structured data)
Physical signed document with digital copy

requirements.title: 10-Year Retention
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST keep the DoC at the disposal of national competent authorities for 10 years.
requirements.rationale: Art. 47(1) requires 10-year retention after market placement.

scoring.partial: R01 met but incomplete Annex V coverage or no retention plan
